rationale: Educ. Code §7.008 governs public access to PEIMS financial and academic performance data via the agency website. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner with the assistance of an advisory panel described by Subsection (b) shall develop a request for proposal for a qualified third-party contractor to develop and implement procedures to make available, through the agency Internet website, all financial and academic performance data submitted through the Public Education Information Management System (PEIMS) for school districts and campuses.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns PEIMS data accessibility and has no operative connection to homestead exemption amounts or property tax policy.
